_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to characterize a target admin/user's technical abilities, habits, and skills.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and problems that can be solved more simply and reliably with rule-based logic or statistical methods.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.541), TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.535).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.1/10 (raw 0.214). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [abilities, admin, characterize, habits, s, skills] vs WIDAI-only terms [based, distinguish, learning, logic, machine, methods] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.881, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.023 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Ability to characterize a target admin/user's technical abilities, habits, and s" and "Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and proble" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.548 > STS 0.214 (gap +0.334). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [abilities, admin, characterize, habits, s, skills]. WIDAI-only: [based, distinguish, learning, logic, machine, methods].
